display_name_sources: source_facts.name is vitetris; official homepage identifies the project as vitetris.
docs_sources: Official vitetris homepage includes download, FAQ, install, feature, and README references, making it the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/vicgeralds/vitetris; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a terminal Tetris clone; official homepage lists Tetris gameplay, two-player mode, network play, and Unix-like terminal use.
